body.title: uuhelp: list all uu* commands with descriptions
body.result: uuhelp script created — lists all uu* commands from ~/bin with descriptions extracted from shebang comments
body.intention: I intend that uuhelp surfaces all available uu* commands so Akien can discover tools without reading the code.
body.description:
We have uumytickets, uuquestions, uushowticket, uuticketadd, uurecall, uuresearch — need a help command that lists them all with usage.

Script should read ~/bin/uu* files, extract the docstring (e.g., """..."""), and display one line per command: uucommand — brief description.

**Affected files:** ~/bin/uuhelp (new)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: list uu* commands with one-line description. OUT: interactive help, paging, documentation generation
**Completion criteria:** uuhelp runs and shows all uu* executables from ~/bin with name + one-line extracted description. Examples: `uumytickets — show tickets assigned to Akien (guru/akien role)`; `uurecall — librarian full-text recall from the command line`
